reports.title: The Iran Ceasefire Expires Wednesday and Trump Says He Won't Extend It
reports.subtitle: A 14-day pause in a seven-week war is about to end. The market gives a deal only 17% odds. The blockade of Hormuz is the real fight.

reports.title: Tim Cook Is Out. Apple's New CEO Is a Hardware Engineer in the Age of AI.
reports.subtitle: Apple just handed its future to the person who builds devices, not the person who trains models. That's a deliberate bet on what the AI era actually requires.

reports.title: Kevin Warsh Goes Before the Senate Promising Independence He May Not Be Able to Deliver
reports.subtitle: Trump's Fed pick is vowing to protect central bank autonomy while depending entirely on Trump's party to get confirmed. The contradiction is the point.

reports.title: SCOTUS Takes Up a Case That Could Let Religious Schools Exclude LGBTQ Families and Still Take Public Money
reports.subtitle: The Catholic preschool case is not about preschools. It is about whether publicly funded institutions can use religious identity to opt out of nondiscrimination requirements.

reports.title: Pennsylvania Court Strikes Down Medicaid Abortion Ban, Opening the Next Front in the Post-Dobbs War
reports.subtitle: The ruling uses the state constitution's Equal Rights Amendment to establish a fundamental right to reproductive autonomy. That's a legal argument designed to survive federal courts.
